title: [FIRRTL] Add API to FExtModules to get their defname, falling back to module name
body: An extmodule has both a module name and a def name. In a few places where we need to get the name of an extmodule, we have this pattern where we first try to get the defname, then fall back to the module name. We should capture this pattern in a member-function on the FExtModuleOp class.
